text: Championing leadership development opportunities for student and early career nurses and midwives around the world Hear from members of the Nursing Now Challenge here! Click to watch the new Nursing Now Challenge video Our new podcast, Grassroots is out now! Listen here! Welcome to the Nursing Now Challenge, a programme of The Burdett Trust for Nursing In June 2021, the Nightingale Challenge was relaunched as the Nursing Now Challenge.

Register to become a member and join our growing global network today! See the global spread of members, Challengers’ Committee members as well as Advisory Board members & Associates on our new interactive map below.

The Nursing Now Challenge carries forward the ambitious mandate of the Nightingale Challenge, and works with health employers, universities and colleges, as well as individuals around the world. Creating leadership development opportunities for student and early-career nurses and midwives around the world. Sign up and join the Nursing Now Challenge network.

You can now join as an organisation or as an individual. Caring with Presence: Communication Techniques, Self-Care, and Professional Resilience in Nursing Launching the Leadership Insights Programme New research-themed NNCGSI in collaboration with the RCN’s Institute for Nursing Excellence launching soon! Nursing Times and Journal of Nursing Leaders Launch Nursing Leaders 2026.
